step_by_step_thinking: I agree with the selected option A: Synchronized cardioversion. Given the patient's ongoing symptomatic PSVT with marked hypotension, there is an urgent need to restore normal sinus rhythm quickly while minimizing additional stress on the already compromised circulatory system. Unlike direct current (DC) shocks which carry higher risks without synchronization, synchronized cardioversion offers targeted energy delivery ensuring safety during conversion back into sinus rhythm.
